source: UniProt VIM-2 reference records Q5U7L7 and Q9K2N0
protein_gym_sequence_note: The ProteinGym A4GRB6_PSEAI sequence is length 266 and differs from the reviewed Q5U7L7 VIM-2 sequence at one non-site position: ProteinGym I185 versus Q5U7L7 V185.

reviewed_reference_support.support: Reviewed VIM-2 record with Zn(2+) cofactor annotation and PDB-backed Zn-binding features.

pseudomonas_structure_support.support: Unreviewed Pseudomonas aeruginosa VIM-2 record with many X-ray structures and PDB-backed Zn-binding features.

motif_support.motif: second zinc-site His/Cys/His region in class B metallo-beta-lactamases

label_decision: Use positions 114, 116, 118, 179, 198, and 240 as the exact metal-binding/mechanism-critical slice for A4GRB6_PSEAI_Chen_2020. Treat it as evaluation-only annotation, not a design protocol.
